history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A screenshot shows a chat-style interface with text and an image thumbnail over a dark patterned background.

The main focus is a chat thread with repeated “David” entries and a profile-like name label, along with a square image thumbnail showing a person in an orange outfit.

The setting appears to be an on-screen messaging or social media chat view, with a dark background covered by faint light line-art icons and shapes; no real-world location is visible. Lighting is uniform and screen-like, with a small thumbnail image placed in the conversation.

Visual Details: The background is dark gray to black with a repeating pattern of thin, light outlines of icons such as stars, circles, and possibly game-controller-like shapes. A blue message bubble contains the word “David” in white. Below it, another blue bubble includes a sentence in Indonesian: “gw ada stiker dari oran random” followed by an image emoji of a person. A second blue label area again shows “David.” Beneath that is a smaller line that reads “Diteruskan.” A square thumbnail image is centered in the chat bubble area, showing a person with red hair wearing an orange top, with a white-and-pale hair accessory or strap visible; the thumbnail has a timestamp “18.01” in light text at the bottom-right. A small icon resembling a double-arrow is visible to the right of the thumbnail.

Visible Text: David
gw ada stiker dari orang random 👤
Diteruskan
18.01

Practical Summary: The image shows a dark, patterned chat interface with several blue message bubbles labeled “David.” It includes Indonesian text and a square thumbnail of a red-haired person in an orange outfit.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

David
gw ada stiker dari orang random
David
Diteruskan
18.01

# Structured Version

## Chat Messages

- David
  - gw ada stiker dari orang random
- David
  - Diteruskan

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
